heading: Persons born in the Canal Zone or Republic of Panama on or afterFebruary 26, 1904

children.label: a
children.text: Any person born in the Canal Zone on or after , and whether before or after the effective date of this chapter, whose father or mother or both at the time of the birth of such person was or is a citizen of the United States, is declared to be a citizen of the United States.February 26, 1904

children.label: b
children.text: Any person born in the Republic of Panama on or after , and whether before or after the effective date of this chapter, whose father or mother or both at the time of the birth of such person was or is a citizen of the United States employed by the Government of the United States or by the Panama Railroad Company, or its successor in title, is declared to be a citizen of the United States.February 26, 1904
